title: Demon Slayer Kimetsu no Yaiba Custom GUI Pack
description: This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Demon Slayer ". I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container. The palette that I choose is Green & Red
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/UoRcApc.png) **Introduction:** This GUI-only resource pack is designed to seamlessly integrate with other resource packs. Just place it on top of your existing resource pack to experience a customized interface inspired by "Demon Slayer." I've not only changed the hot bar but also experimented with adding different pictures to each container. The chosen palette includes Green and Red, but I'm open to suggestions for alternative color schemes like Yellow and Blue or any other colors. Your feedback is essential, so feel free to contact me through the discord server. If you encounter any bugs, report them, and I'll fix them promptly. **Community Engagement:** Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions, and have the chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/1xTqtLh.png) - **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/iXNR1FA.png) - **Largest Chest:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/QxNvQ8v.png) - **Crafting:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/SWc0ZNA.png) - **Blast Furnace:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/fyhacAG.png) - **Enchant Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/SA6vqKQ.png) - **Cartography Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Fv7OG6d.png) - **Grind Stone:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/jE7juQS.png) - **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/jkjhEh6.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/FdkrCFw.png) **Additional Resources:** - [ListarMC Website](https://listarmc.com/) - [Support via Ko-fi](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
